headline: PayPal: M&A Bids Don't Change The Weak Growth Profile

headline: Morgan Stanley Says Stripe-Advent Deal Is PYPL's 'Most Credible' Path To Value Realization After PayPal Board Reportedly Deems Offer Inadequate
summary: Morgan Stanley added that it does not see any other realistic catalysts for PayPal capable of driving a sustained reacceleration in revenue and earnings growth.

headline: Can Visa Stock Compound Its Way Higher?
summary: Visa (V) trades at $365.14 per share on a $660.2B market cap and 29.7x trailing earnings. Under a conservative 3-year scenario, the math points to roughly 42% upside. Revenue compounding does most of the work in our scenario. Here is the picture that the math sits on top of.
